note: Creusot documentation moved from GitHub Pages to the custom domain creusot.rs. Verified HTTP 200.

Pearlite specification language guide relocated to creusot.rs/guide/pearlite.html. Verified HTTP 200.
Legacy Creusot GitHub Pages site now redirects to the canonical creusot.rs domain. Verified HTTP 200.
Verus project homepage (organization GitHub Pages root) is no longer served; replaced with the main Verus repository. Verified HTTP 200.
Verus documentation root now served under /verus/guide/. Verified HTTP 200.
The comparison page was removed in the current Verus guide and no equivalent page exists. Confirmed 404.
Kani CI documentation moved to install-github-ci.html in the current mdBook. Verified HTTP 200.
Coverage reports are now documented under Experimental Features / Coverage. Verified HTTP 200.
Loop contracts documentation moved to Experimental Features / Loop Contracts. Verified HTTP 200.
The old publications page no longer exists; Kani papers are now maintained in the repository's papers/ directory. Verified HTTP 200.
Introductory tutorial renamed to tutorial-first-steps.html. Verified HTTP 200.
kani-rustc-specific tutorial is no longer present; replaced with the general command-line usage guide. Verified HTTP 200.
Rust Verification Workshop 2024 homepage is no longer served at rustverify.github.io; the RustVerify 2024 proceedings PDF is available on hacspec.github.io. Verified HTTP 200.
Rustlantis project homepage is no longer served; the GitHub repository is the canonical project location. Verified HTTP 200.
The Iris tutorial PDF is no longer hosted at iris-project.org; the same paper is available from the MPI-SWS authors' page. Verified HTTP 200.
The old specifications.html page was split in the new Prusti user guide; verify/summary.html is the overview of verification features and links to specification syntax. Verified HTTP 200.
Same Liquid Types (PLDI 2008) paper, now located under /~rjhala/liquid/. Verified HTTP 200.
The original URL appears to have been malformed; the paper is available as linearsub/linearsub.ps on Wadler's site (PostScript format). Verified HTTP 200.
